document.name: NARDO’s BURGER: Your Burger in One Tap

children.name: The project followed a user-centered design approach, starting with defining user flows and structuring the app’s navigation. The interface was designed to ensure a seamless ordering process—from browsing products to checkout—while maintaining a clean and modern visual style. Process: Requirement Analysis User Flow & Wireframing UI Design Prototyping Iteration & Refinement
children.characters:
The project followed a user-centered design approach, starting with defining user flows and structuring the app’s navigation. The interface was designed to ensure a seamless ordering process—from browsing products to checkout—while maintaining a clean and modern visual style.

Process:
Requirement Analysis
User Flow & Wireframing
UI Design
Prototyping
Iteration & Refinement

children.name: A collection of high-fidelity UI screens and interactive prototypes demonstrating the user journey, AI interactions, and overall experience design.
children.characters: A collection of high-fidelity UI screens and interactive prototypes demonstrating the user journey, AI interactions, and overall experience design.

children.name: NARDO’s BURGER: Your Burger in One Tap
children.characters: NARDO’s BURGER: Your Burger in One Tap

children.name: NARDO’s BURGER is a mobile e-commerce application concept designed to provide users with a fast and convenient way to browse, order, and manage burger products online. The project focuses on delivering a smooth and visually engaging food ordering experience.
children.characters: NARDO’s BURGER is a mobile e-commerce application concept designed to provide users with a fast and convenient way to browse, order, and manage burger products online. The project focuses on delivering a smooth and visually engaging food ordering experience.

children.name: This project was developed as part of an academic requirement during my 2nd year in college, focusing on creating an intuitive and user-friendly mobile shopping experience. Platform: Mobile Application Type: School Project Deliverables: UI Screens, User Flow, Interactive Prototype
